reviews.review_text: Originally booked as group of 4 couples. Then down to 2 and change of dates. Staff were more than accommodating with all of the changes. Quiet little park with great beach access. Great ride into town with bikes (Quicker than the car). Well situated to Byron. Manager stopped for chat in mornings. If you are looking for peace and quiet close to town this is it!

My partner and I went camping here last weekend, an impromptu sleep in the back of the car under the stars kind of trip. This place was great, right next to the beach, a beautiful walk up to the light house, hot showers clean toilets a kitchen and a few sinks in and around the campsite to wash dishes. They also had wifi.
We had such a wonderful time, this is open to caravans, RVs and tents of all kinds (and hatch backs like ours!)  there is an IGA a short trip down the road if you forget some essentials like we did.

Amazing find and great campsite in Suffolk Park! We’re so grateful to have found this spot (right next to the beach) at a very reasonable price! Great site/s and facilities and the staff on the phone were great too! Would recommend! So pleased we found this one over others around Byron. Very close to a pub, shop, restaurants, pharmacy and bakery too! Defo recommend and wish we had longer to stay here!
We had Caravan site it was an amazing location - everything was well maintained and clean. Cant wait for the next trip

If you’re heading to Byron Bay, do yourself a favour and stay at Suffolk Beachfront Caravan Park, hands down the best park in the area. The location is unbeatable, literally right on a secluded beach that feels like your own private slice of paradise.
The amenities are spotless and really well maintained, which makes a huge difference when you’re away from home. What really sets this place apart though is the staff, super friendly, welcoming, and always happy to help with anything you need.
Couldn’t recommend this place enough. We’ll definitely be back!

This place so chilled and you feel like are surrounded by nature.

You can here the waves all day

Excelente ubicación, a pasos del mar! Ideal para ir a desconectarse!
Los servicios muy buenos y limpieza muy buena! A 10 minutos del centro

A great beachfront location in a peaceful beautiful  tree lined park.|The team at Suffolk Park were welcoming, friendly & accomodating of our family member’s needs.  |The amenities are older, however they were very clean and the showers  had great hot water pressure. |Tallow beach is beautiful, and you can easily walk to Broken Head beach to the south,  or Byron to the North. |The little town  is a 5 minute walk & has a pub,Spur mini market, great bakery, and delicious Vietnamese cuisine from Ms Ho. |We’ll definitely be back for another  relaxing stay. |Thanks Craig, Bree and the team.
Brillant! Attentive and friendly staff - perfect location with clean and well maintained facilities.
Fantastic place, so super close to beach!!!||Enjoy the place so much, wake up and walked out for a swim first thing in the morning. Great pizza place , bakery nearby.
We love this caravan park, since finding it we return every year. Best place to unwind and feel the best of what Byron bay has to offer without being in all the hustle and bustle.
Lovely location. Sites fairly small but lush gardens gave a private feel. Short walk to beach and shops. Given choice of sites. Facilities a bit old but clean and functional. Will go back.
Für uns ist es ein schöner Campingplatz, sauber und ruhig. Schöner Strand und in 24 Minuten mit dem Bus ist man in Byron Bay.

This is a nice quiet place to base yourself out of. Ok it’s a little away from the hub-Bub of Byron but down the street has all the eats and coffee shops you need. It’s very relaxing and there is access to Tallow Beach from here (25m) and great long sandy walk either way on an uncrowded beach.
Amazing stay! My partner and I will definitely return. Love Suffolk Park & Byron Bay! Can’t wait!!!!

Location was perfect!! Directly at the beach and so close to the bakery and shops. Only negative was the wifi literally didnt work as the mbps was entirely too slow for me to have a video work meeting. I 100% suggest they upgrade their internet as mbps was at or below 10 mbps entire stay

The camp ground is located next to the beach and between beatiful old trees. The personnel was VERY friendly and competent. The facilities were clean and overall was a familiar and calm atmosphere. We saw many dolphins while swimming and some of the came very near to us.  450 meters  from the camp ground is a supermarket and restaurants.
Good stay , recommend location
Went with my kids a while ago. Loved waking up and walking straight to the beach for a sunrise view to start the day. Easy drive into Byron. Loved our stay.

What a delightful caravan park!|It's not a very large park and is well laid out with a lot of shade trees and picnic tables dotted around.|The beautiful beach is only a few steps away and can be reached directly from the park.|The reception staff are very friendly and helpful. We'll be back for sure!
Vreselijke service bij de receptie. Wij werden niet geholpen en de mevrouw aan de balie was zeer sacherijnig en geïrriteerd.

What a lovely setting for a caravan park.  We are not 'caravanners' so hired 'glamping tent' complete with fans and air conditioning.  Had everything and more that we needed for our 3 night stay.  Very clean and privacy was good.  Easy access to the beach.

We stayed here in our Coaster bus twice in the last month while traveling down and back up the coast and it is a firm favourite. The location cannot be beaten - shaded camp spots with direct access to the most beautiful beach and a fab cafe within easy walking distance too. Great facilities for showering and laundry, clean throughout, and very friendly and helpful staff. Highly recommend and very much hope to return.
Right on the beach, not far from town, local area has tons to offer for food. Campsite was immaculate and easy going. Views of the lighthouse, very cool at night!

Extremely disappointing experience at Suffolk Beachfront Holiday Park. The amenities were in terrible condition — showers had visible mould, toilets were dirty, and the general hygiene throughout the facilities was unacceptable. Campsites were poorly maintained with uneven ground and overgrown areas, making setup difficult and uncomfortable.

What made it worse was the attitude of the staff — they were unhelpful and seemed completely indifferent to guest concerns or the condition of the park. It’s clear that maintenance and customer service are not a priority here.

Would strongly recommend avoiding this park until major improvements are made. There are plenty of other options nearby that actually care about cleanliness and their guests’ experience.

We had an amazing stay at Suffolk Beachfront Holiday Park. Our spot was perfect, with fresh water, grey water drainage, and power. The campground is small, which makes it peaceful and really pleasant. Best of all, you can reach the beach in less than a minute. Everything was well maintained, and the service was friendly and helpful. We couldn’t find anything to complain about – everything was perfect. Highly recommended!
Had another great stay at this park. The cleanliness of the facilities is outstanding. The park is very peaceful and relaxing, if you feel the need to.go into Byron Bay it's a 10 minute drive.
Our favourite ❤️ park is clean, perfect location. Can't fault it.

We had an absolutely amazing stay at Suffolk Beachfront Holiday Park! The location is unbeatable - tucked between the bush and the beach with direct access to the sand. Falling asleep to the sound of the waves and waking up to a sunrise walk on the beach felt like pure paradise.

What really made our trip, though, was the service. A huge thank you to Craig, who went above and beyond to fit us in at the very last minute. He was so friendly, welcoming, and genuinely helpful - nothing was too much trouble. It made such a difference to be greeted with that level of kindness and care when we were in a bit of a scramble to find somewhere to stay.

The park itself is great, beautifully maintained, and has a relaxed, intimate vibe. The facilities are clean and well set up, the sites are spacious and shaded, and it’s the perfect base to explore Byron Bay while still enjoying peace and quiet away from the crowds.

We couldn’t be happier with our experience and will absolutely be back. Thank you Craig and the Suffolk Beachfront team for turning our last-minute plans into a truly memorable holiday!

Visited again - The best kept secret in Byron Bay area 50 Meters from the beach. The location is perfect (10 min from the hustle of Byron Bay) and the caravan park is immaculately clean.
Nothing tops the service from people who care - I must mention Craig and team who provided an amasing service.
Excellence in customer service!

We had a wonderful time at Suffolk Park Holiday Park.Very close to the beautiful beach and close to all the shops and restaurants as well. A lovely relaxed atmosphere,we always felt welcome.Thank you so much to Craig for taking care of me and my family and thank you to all the wonderful staff.😊

Very good camping! Great location by the beach and the area has everything you might need. Very clean, quiet and well maintained 😊 Stayed 3 nights with the campervan and another 3 nights in Tuckeroo which was more comfortable than we even expected.

We were in a caravan not in a cabin and we are so glad that we stayed here. The park manager, Craig, was so friendly and helpful. He even tuned our antennae. The visitors centre was closed when we got there but Craig helped us with what to see and do around Byron Bay. The sites are so big and the park is right next to the beach. Loved this park.
Paradise tucked away doesn’t get any better
facilities are clean, staff are really friendly and helpful, i go here often and i love it

Craig the legend gave us the head up that some bad weather was closing in just before we made payment (sleeping in our car for the night) - a great display of integrity in park management. Safe to say the rain hit hard and we made it back up to our place in QLD for the night. Looking forward to visiting another time!

Nothing to fault.  On the morning of our trip, I called and booked the safari tent instead of camping as rain was predicted.

The park is picturesque, next to the beach, a short walk to the shops and very clean.

Stayed here as a teen and hoped the kids would enjoy as much as I did back then.

Shout out to Teddi and Josie for making sure we were looked after.

Safari tents very spacious and lovely glamping style. This is the second time we have been in the last few years and is well maintained. Reverse cycle aircon in tent for heating is a massive plus! So quiet and close to beach and away from the hussle but still close enough to go explore the area!

Beautiful place to stop for the night, management were very nice and the campsites are also very clean. The amenities are very clean and the showers are great. Close to very good food up the road and you wake up to singing lorikeets, kookaburras and butcher birds. Will stop in again

My girlfriend and I both have small Hiace vans and we were always previously welcome to park both of them on one site. However, on 15/5/25 the lady in the office told me we could now only bring in one van. We take up less space than a caravan and car, and there is no boom gate. It's a shame, we really like this place.
Location is great, cabins were very small and dated.
79 dollars for unpowered site and no wifi.
Beautiful holiday park with direct beach access and very clean facilities! We're sad that we couldn't stay longer than a few days.

Great camping/fishing trip away.
Amenities were great. Stayed in the Safari tent, plenty of room for us all.
Close to beach,Great fishing.Whatmore could you want.
Great staff. One of us left our phone/wallet in the cabin. Called them & asked if they found it ,they had asked if they could send back to us ,they did.
Awesome service from Jen.
Will be back again with the family next time.
Great place

My stay here is going down as the single best campsite I’ve ever been to! They could ride on the stunning location, with a private seconds long path to the beach to stay booked.
But the facilities were plenty and clean, even on a long weekend in January. The staff would see me confused and stop to ask if I needed help. As two young women staying, we always felt safe and comfortable.
The power was out for the whole town and they were helpful with information and offering assistance if needed.
If you’re thinking of staying, this is the perfect blend of beach getaway, close to the action of byron with excellent amenities and amazing staff.
The park is located nearby the beach. We had a great time there. The amenities are nice and clean.

Beautiful park, small sites if you have a large caravan but perfect for campers in tents, camper vans, Camper trailers, motor homes and small vans.

Well maintained and clean. Short stroll to beach and shops

Overall this is a beautiful place situated right at the beachfront with its own track to access the amazing beach. The campsites are pretty small though, the kitchen is equipped below average (there are BBQs though) and the amenities definitely could need an upgrade. Nevertheless, it’s clean and a cozy family-friendly place with lots of travelers staying for a few weeks.
Loved that the camping has a spot to go to the beach! A lot of shade too

Leider sehr trostloser Campingplatz.
Wlan gibt es auch nicht obwohl angegeben
Pool auch keiner vorhanden.

Decent camping ground, good location, clean bathrooms.
However, the camp kitchen is a bit of a shocker, really need an upgrade or at least do something about the flies.

We had a fantastic stay at this campground! The staff is incredibly friendly and helpful – you feel welcome from the moment you arrive. The facilities are very clean and well-maintained, making the stay really comfortable.

The location is ideal: right on the beautiful Tallow Beach, perfect for beach walks and surfing. There’s a bus stop right in front of the campground, with buses to Byron Bay’s town center taking about 15 minutes. A day ticket is only $5 – a great alternative, as parking a van in town can be pricey and stressful.

Nearby, there's also the amazing Suffolk Bakery, which I highly recommend. It’s the perfect spot for a delicious breakfast or coffee in the morning. We'd love to come back!
We stayed in the Casuarina safari tents and had an absolutely fantastic time. The tent was clean, comfortable and spacious and the location was unbeatable. Service was great and helpful

We had booked in for 2 nights then after arriving we extended for 4nights as this is such a beautiful peaceful location, lots of trees for shade, artificial grass sites, great camp kitchen, clean amenities and very friendly helpful staff. Nice to hear the sounds of the ocean at night and we even had 3owls in the tree above our site which was the highlight for the few kids around us. Thanks Suffolk park for an enjoyable stay.

We stayed eight nights in a tent in October and thoroughly enjoyed ourselves. The campsite is in a quiet area and brilliantly located for tallow beach, as well as a short drive to Byron Bay and south to Lennox Head, Ballina etc. The sites vary in size, the facilities are well maintained but only the essentials: the beach and the serenity are the real draw cards. Thanks Suffolk Park, we’ll be back!
Great caravan park on the beach.

We stayed four nights. The park is set off the main road. Heaps of trees around. The sites have artificial turf down, which was great. The amenities were spotlessly clean and tidy. Just a short stroll over the sand dunes and you are on the beach. We thought it was better to stay here rather than closer to Byron Bay. There is a pub, bakery and I think it was an IGA just up the road. Would definitely return.

Great holiday park. Near Byron Bay. Has many tent, caravans and mobile homes asxuwrell as multible options for overnight stay. It's nestled amongst the trees and 1 minute walk to the beach. Great place to camp or stay over
We loved our stay here. Staff very helpful and amenities really clean. Beautiful spot!
Amazing location for breathwork and meditation

Right on the beach! Helpful staff lent us some tools to fix a stuck hose connector. Sites are a good size and the amenities were clean enough. In a nice area with a couple of shops and restaurants nearby, Byron is around 15 mins drive away.
Nice and relax place ! Would love to stay longer but not abaliability! Next time,
We were on a grassed site at front of park there is a plumbed sink to be shared by a few sites. So on the beach front you can walk to Byron in an hour or so. Magical beach
Lovely site plan to stay 2 end 4 nights

Great location right on the beach. The kitchen area is brilliant and has lovely tables which are great for big groups.

The staff really put the effort into keeping the place clean and tidy.
Such a great spot and beautiful accomodation as well as the staff so friendly and helpful.

Location is awesome but staff are beyond rude.

I never leave reviews, but this experience was so wildly below what anyone should expect. We had three terrible interactions, all with different staff on each day of our trip.

We booked a cabin with 3 beds in it, I was staying with my brother. When we arrived they’d only made one of the three beds. I guess they assumed we were married as we have the same last name. Totally easy mistake to make, but then they refused to make the other bed for us. They said ‘we don’t do that. If you wanted two beds set up you should’ve written that in the booking’ I said ‘it was clear we had 2 people staying in the booking, I can see it’s an easy mistake to think we are sharing, but now that I’ve told you we’re not, please can you have the bed made up?’ She flat out refused and just kept saying ‘we don’t do that’ but she can give me the sheets to do it myself if I wanted. Wild. So I made my own bed on night 1.

Day 2.. I asked for two more towels and a fresh bath mat because the towels just weren’t drying because it was storming our whole trip. She said ‘more towels? But you only arrived yesterday’ I explained that the towels were wet and we were here for a birthday so I wanted to wash my hair etc she said ‘We don’t do that. Managements not here so I’ll give it to you as a one off but just so you know we don’t usually do this on only the second day’.

Day 3… because we were travelling not as a couple (😂) we weren’t together all the time so I wanted to have my own key to the cabin. I asked for one and she begrudgingly handed it over and said ‘well don’t lose it they’re like $300’. What a bizarre thing to say! Like handing over something special to an 8 year old.

Anyway, was a super yucky experience and if you want to feel welcome or accommodated, look elsewhere.

With direct access to Tallow Beach,  this beautifully shaded park suits those of us who seek a peaceful sanctuary, a quiet beach,  and relaxing times.  Clean, friendly and comfortable, I highly recommend this home away from home.
Leichter Strandzugang, kleinere Shops u Restaurant in der Nähe
Way too expensive, and lost two more stars for the Credit Card rip-off fee.
Fantastic location right by the beach ⛱️

We camped in this beautiful park in our own campervan so my accommodation five stars is for our van but their immaculate camping sites! We get our own piece of fake grass to camp on which makes the site excellent if it rains! This is our favourite park to visit its small, clean, friendly with a great camp kitchen area and older shower block but very clean! You fall asleep to the sound of the ocean there’s a cut through for beach walking and just a short walk to an incredible bakery, cafes pub and supermarket! 100% recommend this little piece of paradise!
Nice place to Camp directly at the beach. All clean.

Sehr freundlicher Service, Sauberkeit prima, alles sauber und gepflegt. Wir waren eine Woche dort und planen, wiederzukommen, wenn wir auf dem Rückweg sind. Der Zugang zum Strand ist auch super. Insgesamt sehr ruhig und entspannt dort. Sehr nette residents. Wir haben uns dort sehr wohl gefühlt.
Incredible! We had a trip we will always remember. Thank you!
Went and did acreccy there. Was disappointed with how small and packed the placexwas,. Not for us.

Thoroughly enjoyed our stay at the caravan park on powered site. Friendly helpful staff. The beach is beautiful and unspoiled.
The amenities are clean and tidy. Felt safe and secure. Camp sites well maintained. Would definitely recommend this caravan park as a perfect spot for a relaxing holiday.
The meals at the Park Hotel are exceptional also.

Gorgeous little park.
So clean…..thanks to Matt….showers and toilets are spotless.
The staff, receptionist Jenny is so friendly and obliging…..and helped us without us even asking…..great staff….thanks Jenny and Matt
Nice green grass areas and so close to the beach
Great park…..highly recommend
Camped here. Great location right on the beach. Astroturf ground for campsites. Awesome Bakery up the road.
Great Campground. We stayed three nights with our campervan and had a great time. Friendly staff, clean facilities and a great camp kitchen. Also right next to the beach. Highly recommended!

Overall poor value for money. Cabin was not clean and internet insufficient, incl the ‘high speed’ package that you can purchase for $50 p/w - not able to stream or voice/video call for work.

Location however was fantastic - could walk straight onto Broken Head beach which is incredible. We hired bikes from Byron Bay Bikes to get to and from Byron  , can highly recommend!

This is a fantastic spot for a getaway. Perfect location on the beach, close to shops, coffee, pub, takeaway. The artificial turf on the campsites makes camping so easy, clean and convenient. The bathroom amenities were very clean and well maintained. The camp kitchen is adequate, with plenty of seating around it for family meals.
Had a powered site (I think they all are). This park is a great location, with clean amenities and easy walk to beach and shops. Away from the overcrowded Byron town.

Friendly & very helpful staff, the amenities (showers, toilets, laundry, camp kitchen etc.) were impeccably clean and very well maintained. Walk straight out from the park onto a magnificent white sandy beach. I had a fabulous Banh Mi at Mrs. Ho which is the local Vietnamese eatery - easy walk from the holiday park and there's a supermarket and some other restaurants there.  Really enjoyed staying here - would highly recommend.
What a peaceful place with lovely,  I mean very lovely views

Honestly one of the best of its kind.
50m to the beach. 300m to the shops. I’ve been here for a maximum stay of 150 nights… and I will miss it. Great rate and outstanding service with a smile. And if it’s quiet you want.. this is the place. Just a few minutes drive from the word famous Byron Bay… this place is how Byron used to be.  Great people. Awesome location. Breathing scenery on the edge of National Park and Ti Lake. This is your dream holiday destination that’s you can pull and pitch a tent. Park your van.. or maybe go for a Safari tent, or cabin. Everything is always in order and clean thank to the amazing staff. And… did I mention the beach ??
Great location, clean and tidy, friendly staff

We only planed to stay here for 3 nights but ended staying for 9 nights. Such a lovely caravan park with easy access to the beach. Very clean and friendly staff.
Enjoyed our stay with our 3 kids.
Pretty average, the best part is tallow beach which is beautiful! The caravan park itself is pretty meh, the people however that work at reception we’re lovely.
Excellent caravan park, very friendly staff, clean amenities, quiet and a few metres from the amazing beach.
Great quiet park, friendly staff, clean ammenities. Great place.
